_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

_filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: When enabled Act 2 Items, V-Bloods will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 3 Items and V-Bloods will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 4 Items and V-Bloods will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 2 Spells will be included in the Multiworld, independent of goal or other act selections.
When enabled Act 3 Spells will be included in the Multiworld, independent of goal or other act selections.
When enabled Act 4 Spells will be included in the Multiworld, independent of goal or other act selections.
Adds all the Items you receive from a Knowledge Stations into the pool of items and as extra checks.
These Items which are labeled as 'Structures' and 'Consumables' ingame.
Bosses that fewer than 3 locations will receive additional locations.
Adds all journals to the location pool, progression granted by journals will not be added to the item pool.
Frequency for Construction Items such as Planks, Wood, Stone, and Stone Bricks to appear as filler
Frequency for Stygian Shard Filler Items to appear as filler.
Frequency for Coin Filler Items to appear as filler.
Frequency for Seed Filler Items to appear as filler.
